alerts.name: Priya Gupta
alerts.risk_reason: Exposed in 2 breaches | 2 critical-severity leak(s) | recent exposure (<6 months) | critical department (Executive) | plaintext password in 2 source(s) | MFA not enabled
escalation_triggers: MFA not enabled — account at risk
recommended_actions: ⚠️  URGENT: Force password reset — plaintext credential exposed on dark web
🔴 Suspend account access pending security review
🔴 Notify CISO and direct manager immediately
🔴 Audit last 30 days of login activity
📱 Enforce MFA enrollment before next login
🔒 Consider temporary privilege reduction
